content: NexusMods.App uses MnemonicDB: a tuple-oriented (Entity,Attribute,Value,Tx,Assert/Retract) immutable, temporal, in-process datastore (RocksDB backend) like Datomic. Deployment state via three entities: GameInstallMetadata (pointers to last-applied loadout + initial/last-scanned disk-state tx ids), DiskStateEntry (path tuple GameMetadataId/LocationId/RelativePath + xxHash64 + size + mtime), LoadoutItemWithTargetedPath (same tuple for targets). Reversibility from a three-way synchronizer comparing original vs previously-applied vs current disk state; conn.AsOf(txId) recovers any historical state. Loadout = immutable mod list snapshot.
